# Guler Open IT Platform

> A high-authority technical blog focused on System Administration, Networking, Cloud Infrastructure, Virtualization, and Cybersecurity. Curated and written by Faruk Güler.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://farukguler.com/): Latest technical articles and infrastructure guides.
- [About](https://farukguler.com/about/): Profile of Faruk Güler, IT System Administrator & Developer.
- [Categories](https://farukguler.com/categories/): Organized content by technology stack.
- [Tags](https://farukguler.com/tags/): Full topic index across all articles.
- [Archives](https://farukguler.com/archives/): Complete chronological post archive.
- [AppBox](https://farukguler.com/appbox/): Documentation for custom applications and tools.
- [Blockchain](https://farukguler.com/blockchain/): In-depth analysis of Layer 1 protocols and DeFi.

## Primary Projects & Tools

- [Neutron](https://github.com/faruk-guler/neutron): A lightweight multi-server management and automation tool for Linux/Unix environments.
- [Lagrange](https://farukguler.com/projects/lagrange): Python-based security auditing and system hardening framework for Windows/Linux.
- [Keepser](https://farukguler.com/projects/keepser): Privacy-focused, cross-platform note-taking application.

## Core Technical Domains

- **Linux Infrastructure:** Expertise in Debian, Ubuntu, AlmaLinux, and Alpine server hardening.
- **Windows Ecosystem:** Advanced configurations for Active Directory, gMSA (Group Managed Service Accounts), and PKI.
- **Network & Security:** Comprehensive guides on WAF, Firewall management, and CVE remediation.
- **DevOps & Cloud:** Infrastructure as Code (Ansible, Terraform) and Container Orchestration (Kubernetes, RKE2).
- **Storage:** Distributed storage systems including Ceph (Reef/Quincy) with cephadm.
- **Educational Tech:** Scaling LMS platforms (Moodle 5.x, BigBlueButton 3.x) with Scalelite and Pilos.

## Recent Articles

- [Derinlemesine Moodle ve BigBlueButton Kurulumu 2026](https://farukguler.com/posts/derinlemesine-moodle-bigbluebutton-in-depth-moodle-bigbluebutton/) — LMS, DevOps
- [Ceph Storage Cluster: Uçtan Uca Kurulum Rehberi](https://farukguler.com/posts/ceph-storage-detailed-detayli-inceliyorum/) — Storage, Cloud
- [Web Application Firewall (WAF) Nedir?](https://farukguler.com/posts/waf-nedir/) — Security, Networking
- [Linux Firewall Detaylı İnceleme](https://farukguler.com/posts/linux-firewall-detayli-inceliyorum/) — Linux, Security
- [Derinlemesine CertUtil](https://farukguler.com/posts/derinlemesine-certutil-in-depth-certutil/) — PKI, Windows
- [Yönetilen Hizmet Hesapları (sMSA ve gMSA)](https://farukguler.com/posts/what-is-gmsa-and-smsa/) — Active Directory, Windows
- [Fiziksel Sunucu (Bare-Metal) Kurulum ve Yönetim](https://farukguler.com/posts/about-server-installations/) — Infrastructure
- [Domainden Düşen Bilgisayarlar İçin Çözümler](https://farukguler.com/posts/domainden-dusen-bilgisayarlar/) — Active Directory, Windows

## Content Access

- [RSS Feed](https://farukguler.com/feed.xml): Machine-readable XML feed for the latest technical updates.
- [Full Directory](https://farukguler.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed index of all articles for deep crawling.
